name: talonic
description: Extract structured, schema-validated data from PDFs, scans, images, spreadsheets, and forms. Lets AI agents extract clean JSON from any document via the Model Context Protocol.

TALONIC_API_KEY.description: Your Talonic API key. Starts with tlnc_. Get one at https://app.talonic.com.

TALONIC_BASE_URL.description: Override the Talonic API base URL. Default: https://api.talonic.com.
